stories.title: How the Spurs reached the Finals ahead of schedule...
stories.summary: The Spurs let a late lead slip in Game 1, but believe the past two seasons have forged the resilience needed to respond.

stories.title: Meet the Jackals: The Spurs fan club built for the...
stories.summary: Handpicked by Wemby, the Spurs' 83-member fan club turns Section 114 into a roaring, choreographed spectacle.

stories.title: Sources: NBA interviews Kawhi in Aspiration case
stories.summary: LA Clippers star Kawhi Leonard and his business adviser have been interviewed by NBA investigators amid the league's probe into allegations the team circumvented the salary cap to compensate Leonard, sources said.

stories.title: Judge says rib originally fractured on dive in Apr...
stories.summary: Yankees outfielder Aaron Judge said the stress fracture in his right rib stems from him diving for a ball in late April.

stories.title: UFC's White: Pereira the GOAT if he beats Gane
stories.summary: UFC president Dana White believes two-weight UFC champion Alex Pereira will surpass Jon Jones as the greatest MMA fighter of all time if he beats Ciryl Gane June 14 at the White House.
